channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'Ridiculous' plan developed at Florida zoo saves wild rhino's eyesight in Africa
item.description: Animal behaviorists partnering with the Palm Beach Zoo & Conservation Society in Florida traveled to Africa in August to help an endangered white rhin...

item.title: Why Trump's comment on discussing Taiwan arms sales with China has raised concerns
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump says he is discussing potential arms sales to Taiwan with Chinese President Xi Jinping, and that has raised concerns

item.title: Public health, green groups sue EPA over repeal of landmark finding on climate change
item.description: A coalition of health and environmental groups is suing the Environmental Protection Agency, challenging its determination last week that revoked a sc...

item.title: Following Trump's lead, some GOP states seek to limit environmental regulations
item.description: Some Republican legislators are pushing to limit state environmental regulations

item.title: Trump administration appeals order to restore George Washington slavery exhibit in Philadelphia
item.description: The Trump administration will appeal a federal judge’s order to restore a Philadelphia exhibit on the nine people enslaved by George Washington at his...
